name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Town 'N' Country, FL — Swift Title Loans at 6743 Memorial Hwy provides same-day title loans and payday advances.
description_long:
The Town 'N' Country location of Swift Title Loans is located at 6743 Memorial Hwy, Suite #100, in the Town 'N' Country area of FL. This standalone storefront is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 5 PM, and Saturday from 10 AM to 2 PM, making it convenient for working professionals to access emergency funds.

At this Town 'N' Country branch, Swift Title Loans offers title-secured loans and payday advances to residents facing cash shortfalls. You can reach this location at 813-592-7870 to discuss your loan options, get an instant quote, or complete your application over the phone.

If you're a Town 'N' Country resident facing unexpected expenses, this Swift Title Loans location makes it easy to get money fast. Bring your photo ID, proof of income, and vehicle title (for title loans), and you may be able to walk out with cash the same day.
pros: Accepts applicants with bad credit and past bankruptcies
Same-day funding available for applications submitted by noon
Borrower keeps and drives their vehicle during the loan term
Loan range spans $100 to $50,000, broader than many title lenders
Online application protected by 256-bit SSL and TLS security
Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm) and Saturday availability (10am–5pm)
Multiple reviewers cite Alfred's patience and clear explanation of terms
cons: APR, interest rates, and fee structures are not disclosed anywhere on the website
Closed on Sundays, limiting access for borrowers with weekend-only availability
No mobile app for payment management, despite multiple customer requests
No automated payment reminders, which reviewers noted as a gap
Unclear exterior signage, noted by multiple reviewers as confusing for first-time visitors
best_for: Memphis-area borrowers who own a vehicle outright and need cash the same day
Borrowers with poor credit scores or prior bankruptcies who have been denied elsewhere
Individuals needing larger secured loan amounts ($2,000–$50,000) against vehicle equity
Borrowers who need in-person assistance navigating title loan paperwork
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best suited for Memphis vehicle owners who need fast access to cash and cannot qualify for conventional credit products due to poor credit or past bankruptcy. The main caveat is that the website discloses no rate or fee information, which is a significant red flag for any title loan — a product category already known for high APRs and repossession risk. Borrowers should obtain a full written disclosure of all costs before proceeding.
services: Vehicle title held as collateral with vehicle retained by borrower
Title returned to borrower upon full repayment
meta_description: Swift Title Loans at 6743 Memorial Hwy, Town 'N' Country, FL. Same-day title loans available.
seo_title: Swift Title Loans in Town 'N' Country, FL | CreditDoc
